title: Pen normalization + light-fill regen for dead eyes
oneline: Normalizer + regen (or free re-punch) revives dead light-mode eyes; night untouched
summary: Validated end-to-end on objects/teddy-tall and vehicles/police-tall in 6 Gemini calls: the normalizer converted both solid-ink pupils to thin rings (keep 100%, local 99.6%), the light-side eye FAILs cleared, and night/chalk were proven isolated (re-punched night fill byte-identical). Bonus: re-punching the EXISTING light raw against the normalized pen is a zero-API path that already yields lively eyes and preserves the shipped palette — police-tall was fixed with a single Gemini call. Rollout population is ~47 pages (not ~10), est. 100-150 calls / $4-6.
tried: Catalog-wide offline eye + outline-solidity audits for the worst-first ranking (50 light FAILs, 47 of them on solid pens)
Normalizer on objects/teddy-tall (default, then with a --notes naming the star it deleted)
Fresh light-fill regen on teddy-tall from the normalized pen
Zero-API fallback: re-punch the OLD light raw against the NEW pen (teddy-tall, then as the sole path for police-tall)
Normalizer on vehicles/police-tall (passed first attempt) + free re-punch, no fill regen
Isolation proof: git-status + byte-identity of the re-punched night fill
worked: Both pages: blob 719/1886 -> 0, keep 100%, local 99.6%, reverse 100%, all source eye cores preserved
Eye audit light FAIL cleared on both pages (0 flagged); drift audit 100%/100%
Night/chalk fully isolated: chalk untouched, re-punched .night.webp byte-identical
Zero-API re-punch path: lively eyes with 1 total Gemini call per page and the shipped palette preserved
Fresh regen also removed old fill inventions (polka-dot bow, belly patch not in the pen)
failed: First teddy-tall normalize attempt deleted the star above the teddy (worst-tile keep 0%) — needed a --notes retry, repeating the documented bee-wide cloud precedent
limitations: Audit flip is partly definitional: solid-ink pupils are invisible to the eye scorer, so the FAIL measures the fill's inability to paint the eye, not on-canvas breakage in light mode
Visible product change: uncolored light pages and thumbs switch from solid to outlined pupils (thumbs need free regen)
Zero-API re-punch relies on the new ring tracing the old solid's boundary (gate-enforced); eyeball crops for black bleed outside the ring before shipping
creatures/owl-tall (riskiest, perfect chalk) not attempted for budget; spiral-eye nature wides excluded (idea #5's case, normalizer skips them without --force)
All experiment changes reverted per ground rules — rollout must re-run the recipe
